pre_game.message: Hey, I’m H. It’s a bit intense in here with everyone waiting, isn't it? What are you planning to do if you win the prize money?
Nice to meet you, H. I'm B. It’s definitely tense in here. If I win, I'm putting it toward my family to make sure they're taken care of—that's my main priority. How about you?
I’m in the same boat, B. I’m here to help out the people I care about too; it would mean everything to give them some security.
I hear you. It definitely makes the stakes feel higher when it’s not just for yourself. How many people are you hoping to help out?
It’s mainly my parents and my younger sister, but I’d love to help out a few close friends who’ve been struggling too.
That’s a lot of people to look out for. I totally get that pressure; it definitely makes you want to win even more. Have you ever done anything like this before?
Honestly, never. This is way out of my comfort zone, but the potential prize is worth the nerves. What about you, B?
Same here, first time. It's definitely a lot to take in, but I'm just trying to stay focused on the goal.
I’m with you on that. It's a lot to handle, but keeping the end goal in mind is the only way to stay sane.
For sure. It helps knowing someone else feels the same way. Good luck out there, H.
Thanks, B. I really appreciate that. Good luck to you and your family, I hope it all works out.
